Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. =301/PJB
